meta.title: Pre-Construction Information (PCI) — CDM 2015 Reg 4
meta.subtitle: Pre-tender hazard & information set — Tower B brownfield refurbishment
meta.author: Principal Designer (on behalf of the Client)
meta.classification: Restricted distribution — issued to appointed/considered designers & contractors; competent-person review required
meta.deid_notice: Survey occupiers and any health detail are referred to by role label. Identifiers were pseudonymised before drafting; the re-identification key is held separately and is not part of this document.

sections.text: This Pre-Construction Information is provided by the client under CDM 2015 Regulation 4 — as soon as practicable, to everyone appointed or being considered (Reg 4(4)). It assembles the pre-tender hazard and information set for the Tower B brownfield refurbishment (strip-out and reclad levels 3-5, occupied lower floors). No construction phase may start without the arrangements / Construction Phase Plan required by Reg 4(5)/(6).

rows: Presumed ACMs in riser lagging until surveyed — hold-point before strip-out
LV supply + gas main to plant room; intrusive survey to confirm before excavation
Previous industrial use; contamination unknown — assume until investigated
RC frame; non-load-bearing infill panels to levels 3-5
Records prior refurbishment residual risks; reviewed for this pack
sections.caption: L153 Appendix-1 PCI content heads — known versus documented [GAP]

items: Occupied lower floors (levels 0-2) remain in use throughout — segregation and access constraints apply.
Public footpath on the north boundary — public interface / falling-object exclusion required.
Adjacent occupier (role label) with a documented access constraint affects the works sequence (de-identified).
Overhead LV line crosses the east boundary — proximity controls for lifting.

rows.title: Presumed asbestos in risers
rows.description: Riser lagging is presumed to contain asbestos pending an R&D survey; designers and contractors must plan on that basis until the survey clears it.
rows.evidence: Existing H&S file rev C + gap register row G-1

rows.title: Live buried & overhead services
rows.description: LV supply, a gas main, and an overhead LV line are present; locations to be confirmed by intrusive survey before excavation or lifting.

rows.action: G-1 — Commission a refurbishment-and-demolition asbestos survey of the risers and clear/identify ACMs before strip-out
G-2 — Commission a ground investigation / contaminated-land assessment for the previous-industrial-use footprint

sections.text: Gap discipline: every missing existing-structure source is recorded as a [GAP] with a named owner and due date and is NEVER silently omitted. No strip-out may proceed until the asbestos survey (G-1) is complete and the management plan is in force.

This PCI feeds the Construction Phase Plan and, at completion, the Health & Safety File: PCI -> CPP -> H&S File (CDM 2015 Reg 4 -> 12 -> 12(5)). This pack does not assume the CPP or H&S File skill has run (loose coupling).

items: CDM 2015 (SI 2015/51) Regulation 4 — client's pre-construction-information duty (Reg 4(4)); Reg 4(5)/(6) no start without arrangements/CPP
HSE L153 ACOP — Appendix 1 PCI content checklist
ISO 45001 §6.1.2 / §8.1.2 — hazard identification & hierarchy of controls
India: BOCW pre-work site information via hse-india / bocw-compliance — state resolved first, form reference [GAP], never a national form number

sections.text: Decision-support only. This Pre-Construction Information must be reviewed by a competent person before issue. SME review (CDM Principal Designer + CDM Client Adviser personas) ran as decision-support; it does not constitute competent-person approval.
